preamble: Similar to the development of lateral affricates from velar stops, some Na-Dene varieties show shifts from alveolar stops [t] to velar lateral affricates [kʟ] through intermediate stages of lateralization and backing.

examples.note: Shifts in the realization of lateral series across Na-Dene dialects.

sources: Mithun, M. (1999). The Languages of Native North America.
